texto: Those whose lives have been an exercise in the pitting of their wits, or the selling of their talents, time and strength, to those who pay the piper, can even in their old age, even with their wits partially gone, automatically practise defences, and appeal for aid. But not so those who have never asked, who have never bargained.
explicacao: Citação de Norah Houlton sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Those whose lives have been an exercise in the pitting of their wits, or the selling of their tal…” articula tempo, aging, dementia em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como luto e dementia.
